name: toolmaker
description: Tool Maker — create, read, and activate custom tools
author: sapphire

settings.label: Validation Level

options.label: Moderate — blocks dangerous ops, any import

settings.help: How strictly to validate AI-written tool code. Strict allows 40+ safe modules including requests, json, datetime — covers most tools.

confirm.title: Trust Mode — No Validation
warnings: Trust mode only checks for syntax errors
The AI can use ANY Python import including subprocess, socket, ctypes
This is equivalent to giving the AI unrestricted code execution
Only use this if you fully trust your LLM and prompt setup
